option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<!-- Location permissions for getting current location --> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.DONORlk" tools:targetApi="31">
<!-- Google Maps API Key --> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.geo.API_KEY" android:value="AIzaSyBLYt0igljosxuzRfPw-0x866mKXmfYdU8" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".controllers.LoginController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.RegistrationController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.ProfileSetupController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.ForgotPasswordController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.VerificationController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.HomePageController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.DonationHistoryController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.DonationFormController" android:exported="false" /> <activity android:name=".CreateAdminActivity" /> <activity android:name=".controllers.AdminDashboardController" /> <activity android:name=".controllers.AddDonationCenterActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.SubAdminHomeController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.MakeReservationActivity" android:exported="false" />
</application> </manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<!-- Location permissions for getting current location --> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.DONORlk" tools:targetApi="31">
<!-- Google Maps API Key --> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.geo.API_KEY" android:value="AIzaSyBLYt0igljosxuzRfPw-0x866mKXmfYdU8" />
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".controllers.LoginController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.RegistrationController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.ProfileSetupController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.ProfileController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.ForgotPasswordController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.VerificationController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.HomePageController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.DonationHistoryController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.DonationFormController" android:exported="false" /> <activity android:name=".CreateAdminActivity" /> <activity android:name=".controllers.AdminDashboardController" /> <activity android:name=".controllers.AddDonationCenterActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.SubAdminHomeController" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".controllers.MakeReservationActivity" android:exported="false" />
</application> </manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
